overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving through the industrial district of Night City. The car travels from elevated highways down through exit ramps into covered industrial roadways beneath the city, passing the iconic Arasaka building and various industrial structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated multi-lane highway through industrial district

events.description: military truck passes on the left side of the vehicle

agents.ego_description: driving on elevated highway following traffic flow through industrial area

notable_agents.action: military truck overtaking on the left side

entered.detail: tall black corporate tower with vertical white signage
concrete barriers with yellow-black warning stripes
tall industrial chimneys emitting white smoke
overhead electrical transmission lines and pylons

segments.scene_description: Driving on an elevated multi-lane highway through an industrial district with the Arasaka building dominating the skyline. The road is lined with guardrails and power lines, with industrial smokestacks visible in the distance. A military truck overtakes on the left side as the vehicle continues straight.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway exit ramp descending to lower level

events.description: vehicle takes exit ramp leaving main elevated highway
curving descent on the exit ramp with decreasing elevation

agents.ego_description: navigating the descending exit ramp curving down from elevated highway

entered.detail: high concrete walls lining the curved descent ramp
commercial advertising billboards including All Foods brand

segments.scene_description: The vehicle takes an exit ramp descending from the elevated highway, curving leftward between high concrete walls. Commercial billboards line the left side of the ramp as the elevation drops, revealing satellite dishes and lower overpass structures ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower level industrial road beneath elevated highway

events.description: exiting ramp onto lower level industrial road with satellite dishes visible
making right turn at intersection under concrete overpass

agents.ego_description: driving through lower level roads and turning right at intersection

entered.detail: large satellite communication dishes on industrial building rooftops
concrete elevated highway deck casting shadows overhead

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the exit ramp onto a lower level industrial road beneath the elevated highway system. Large satellite dishes are visible on rooftops to the right. The vehicle makes a right turn at an intersection under the overpass, with the Arasaka building now visible in the distance to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered industrial roadway with overhead pipes

events.description: entering covered industrial roadway beneath the city infrastructure
passing through section with dense overhead industrial piping

agents.ego_description: driving through covered industrial corridor with pedestrians visible on sidewalks

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking along the sidewalk next to the covered road

entered.detail: metal and concrete overhead covering creating a tunnel-like effect
massive industrial piping running parallel and above the roadway
rusted metal safety railings along the left edge of the road

segments.scene_description: Driving through a covered industrial roadway beneath the city's elevated infrastructure, with a roof structure blocking the sky. Massive industrial pipes run overhead and along the sides, creating an enclosed corridor. Pedestrians walk along the sidewalks as the vehicle continues through this industrial underbelly of the city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive from an elevated highway through a descending transition into the lower industrial depths of the city. It begins on a multi-lane highway dominated by the Arasaka building and distant smokestacks, where a military truck overtakes the vehicle amidst a network of guardrails and power lines. As the vehicle leaves the main road, the camera curves leftward down an exit ramp, descending between high concrete walls lined with commercial billboards. The scene then opens onto a lower-level industrial road beneath the highway system, passing large satellite dishes on nearby rooftops. Finally, the vehicle makes a right turn at an intersection under the overpass, leaving the Arasaka building as a distant landmark to the left.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic industrial corridor beneath the city's elevated infrastructure. It begins by driving deep into a covered roadway where a heavy roof structure completely blocks the sky. As the vehicle advances, the view is framed by massive industrial pipes that run overhead and along the sides, reinforcing the sense of an enclosed urban underbelly. The scene then maintains this oppressive atmosphere while passing pedestrians on the sidewalks, continuing steadily through the metallic confines of the industrial district.
